impact: The GitHub Actions deploy role is restricted to repo/main OIDC trust and can only assume CDK bootstrap roles directly, but the CDK CloudFormation execution role cdk-hnb659fds-cfn-exec-role-329425487030-us-east-1 currently has AWS-managed AdministratorAccess. This is acceptable as a temporary bootstrap posture for early staging, but deploy permissions should be narrowed to the launch resource set before treating the pipeline as least-privilege or production-ready.
resolution: Added a launch-scoped CDK CloudFormation execution managed policy to the account-baseline stack, output its ARN, covered it with infra tests, and replaced the AdministratorAccess caveat in deploy runbooks with exact rebootstrap and verification steps.
title: CDK bootstrap execution role still has AdministratorAccess
